title: Job

vocabulary.meaning: money paid regularly for doing a job
a piece of work that needs to be done
to make a formal request for a job
able to be trusted to do good work

questions: What is your job? How long have you been doing it? Do you like it? What do you like/dislike about it? Do you plan to keep on doing it?
What do you think of your colleagues at work?
How do you like your boss?
